libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image runs on JDK 25/current-defaults, set runtime system properties for the generated test binary: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. The existing 5.0.0 test scaffold applies these only when libraryVersion == '5.0.0'; extend the condition or otherwise apply them for 5.0.1 as well. Meaningful tests can run entirely against a local Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1 and should not require external network services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The public OAuth2WebClient API references the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 module; only add that dependency if tests intentionally exercise OAuth2WebClient, because core WebClient/session/cache/form coverage does not require it.
Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative for whether the Netty/JDK25 runtime properties are sufficient.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage; tests can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server. However io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves Vert.x Core 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final, matching the existing 5.0.0 Netty 4.2.x native-run workaround, so the generated fix should preserve/apply the native runtime system properties for 5.0.1.
